name: Mareth Line
descriptionTemplate: While on mountainous or desert terrain, you and allies in a 1-tile radius take X% less damage. When commanding land units, the activation chance of the "Rumor" skill increases by 25%. At the end of the turn, if there are any enemies within 2 tiles with lowered morale or in chaos, you and the allies in a 1-tile radius recover 10% of their maximum HP.

longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Mareth Line » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « While on mountainous or desert terrain, you and allies in a 1-tile radius take 25% less dégâts. When commanding land unités, the activation chance of the "Rumor" skill augmente de 25%. À la fin du tour, if there are any ennemis within 2 tiles with lowered moral or in chaos, you and the allies in a 1-tile radius recover 10% of their maximum PV . ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Mareth Line" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "While on mountainous or desert terrain, you and allies in a 1-tile radius take 25% less damage. When commanding land units, the activation chance of the "Rumor" skill increases by 25%. At the end of the turn, if there are any enemies within 2 tiles with lowered morale or in chaos, you and the allies in a 1-tile radius recover 10% of their maximum HP.". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Mareth Line“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „While on mountainous or desert terrain, you and allies in a 1-tile radius take 25% less damage. When commanding land units, the activation chance of the "Rumor" skill increases by 25%. At the end of the turn, if there are any enemies within 2 tiles with lowered morale or in chaos, you and the allies in a 1-tile radius recover 10% of their maximum HP.“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
